tool.name: BeeAI Framework
tool.description: Open agent framework formerly known as Bee Agent Framework, now under Linux Foundation governance.
tool.statusNote: Renamed from Bee Agent Framework; governance moved from IBM to Linux Foundation.
tool.logoNotes: Official BeeAI Framework docs-site logo asset (`beeai-framework-light.svg`) served from the owner-controlled Mintlify CDN.
tool.practitionerNote: Interesting IBM-backed open framework for governed agent patterns, but most teams should still validate ecosystem depth before broad standardisation.

deployment.detail: npm/pip-installed framework under Linux Foundation governance; no managed hosting.

auditLogging.detail: No built-in audit log; operator-configured logging.

soc2.detail: Self-hosted library; SOC 2 applies to the operator's infrastructure, not the package.

iso27001.detail: Self-hosted library; ISO 27001 applies to the operator's ISMS, not the package.

iso42001.detail: Self-hosted library; ISO 42001 applies to the deploying organisation.

euAiAct.detail: Developer component, not an AI system placed on the market; obligations rest with the deployer.
